title: cyclosorus borneensis
intro: Cyclosorus borneensis, also known as the Borneo sword fern or Borneo leather fern, is a species of fern native to the tropical forests of Borneo. It has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, with its medicinal properties attributed to the presence of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Cyclosorus borneensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate fever, and exhibit antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which are often used in traditional remedies for fever reduction, digestive issues, and skin problems.
